prompt.content: The figure is a parallelogram that is not a rectangle or rhombus. Which transformation carries it onto itself?

<svg viewBox='0 0 260 180' role='img' aria-label='A slanted parallelogram'><polygon points='70,125 190,125 220,55 100,55' fill='none' stroke='black' stroke-width='3'/><circle cx='145' cy='90' r='3' fill='black'/><text x='152' y='95' font-size='14'>center</text></svg>

choices.content: A reflection across a vertical line through its center
A reflection across a horizontal line through its center

steps.content: A general parallelogram maps onto itself under a 180° rotation about its center. It usually does not have reflection symmetry.
